coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Vibration]
At 3+ [Charge] Count, reuse this Coin if it lands Heads (Up to 2 times)
If the Coin is reused twice, inflict [Vibration], then trigger [VibrationExplosion]
After [VibrationExplosion], reduce [Vibration] Count by 1

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Vibration]
At 3+ [Charge] Count, reuse this Coin if it lands Heads (Up to 2 times)
Inflict 2 more [Vibration] each time the Coin is reused
If the Coin is reused twice, inflict [Vibration], then trigger [VibrationExplosion]
After [VibrationExplosion], reduce [Vibration] Count by 1

descs.desc: If target has 10+ [Vibration] Count, Coin Power +1

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [Vibration]

[OnSucceedAttackHead] Inflict 2 [Vibration]
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion].
After [VibrationExplosion], reduce [Vibration] Count by 1

[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion].
After [VibrationExplosion], reduce [Vibration] Count by 1
[OnSucceedAttack] If target is Staggered, deal 25% of damage dealt as bonus damage

1090501.name: Here’s to Getting Off Early~
1090501.desc:
On [VibrationExplosion], spend 3 [Charge] Count to increase the Stagger Threshold raise by +40%.
After triggering [VibrationExplosion], gain 1 [Agility] and 1 [HitDamageUp] next turn.

1090521.name: Resonant Spanner
1090521.desc: When 1 ally with the slowest Speed triggers [VibrationExplosion], increase the Stagger Threshold raise by +20%.
